name: healthcare_model_based_triage_tool_begins_harbor_jus_mer
premise: Medical records flagged conflicting allergy entries; anesthesia refuses to proceed without a single reconciled source of truth. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare model based triage tool begins harbor jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Elliot Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Elliot Nielsen, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Ravi Alvarez, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with mercy.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to mercy to preserve operational justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Elliot Nielsen must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Elliot Nielsen do?
